description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build job (default stage) that removes any *.deb files and the var/www/monitor.home/bower_components directory, runs yarn install --modules-folder var/www/monitor.home/bower_components, builds a Debian package with fpm using after_install.sh, setting the package name monitor-home, version $BASE_VERSION-$CI_JOB_ID, dependency supervisor, maintainer $MAINTAINER, description $DESC and including etc var usr, and finally runs ~/add_repository.sh. Define the variables BASE_VERSION='0.1', DESC='Service monitor', and MAINTAINER='Alexander Teseyko <alexteko@gmail.com>'.
